Coffee that feels like coming home.

Welcome to Ember & Bean, a neighborhood coffee house serving ethically sourced espresso, flaky house-made pastries, and slow mornings worth savoring.

Cardamom Buns

Out of the oven at 8 AM

Our Story

Small-batch coffee, baked goods, and a table saved for you.

Ember & Bean began with one simple promise: make every cup feel personal. We partner with thoughtful growers, roast in small seasonal batches, and prepare each drink with care — from the first espresso pull to the final pour of silky microfoam.

Whether you’re settling in with a laptop, meeting an old friend, or grabbing a quick cortado before work, our café is designed to be warm, welcoming, and deliciously unhurried.

Ethically sourced

We build lasting relationships with importers and farms committed to fair pricing, soil health, and exceptional flavor.

Crafted to order

Every drink is dialed in daily, weighed precisely, and finished by baristas who love the details.

Community first

Cozy corners, local art, open mic nights, and friendly faces make this more than a coffee stop.

Seasonal Menu

From first sip to final crumb.

Our menu changes with the seasons, but the essentials stay the same: balanced espresso, comforting classics, and pastries baked before sunrise.

Signature

Ember Latte

$6

Double espresso, maple-brown sugar, velvet milk, and a smoked cinnamon finish.

House favorite Oat milk option

Slow Bar

Single-Origin Pour Over

$7

Rotating micro-lot brewed by hand for clarity, sweetness, and delicate aromatics.

Rotating origin Vegan

Iced

Velvet Cold Brew

$5

Steeped for 18 hours with notes of dark chocolate, toasted pecan, and orange peel.

Low acidity Dairy-free

Baked Daily

Cardamom Morning Bun

$5

Laminated dough, citrus sugar, fragrant cardamom, and a glossy honey glaze.

Fresh at 8 AM Vegetarian

Sweet

Brown Butter Cookie

$4

Crispy edges, chewy center, dark chocolate chunks, and a sprinkle of sea salt.

Best seller Pairs with espresso

Savory

Avocado Toast

$12

Seeded sourdough, lemony avocado, pickled shallot, chili crisp, and herbs.

Vegetarian Add egg

Cozy corners · Fast Wi‑Fi · Friendly baristas

Inside the café

A warm place to pause, work, meet, or wander.

32

Seats inside

12

Patio tables

2

Weekly events

What to Expect

Designed for slow mornings and bright ideas.

We obsess over the little details: warm lighting, comfortable seating, well-spaced tables, playlists that never shout, and staff who remember your usual.

Laptop-friendly weekday mornings

Reliable Wi‑Fi, plenty of outlets, and quiet hours from 7 AM to 11 AM.

Fresh pastries before sunrise

Croissants, buns, cookies, and seasonal specials are baked in small batches every morning.

Community nights after dark

Join us for latte art workshops, local musicians, poetry readings, and tasting flights.

Local Love

Regulars come for the coffee. They stay for the feeling.

★★★★★ 4.9 average rating
★★★★★

“The Ember Latte is genuinely perfect — cozy, not too sweet, and always beautifully made. This has become my morning ritual.”

MR

Maya R.

Designer & daily regular

★★★★★

“Best pour over in town. The staff explains the flavor notes without making it feel intimidating. Warm, welcoming, excellent.”

JL

Jon L.

Coffee enthusiast

★★★★★

“I bring clients here because it feels calm and thoughtful. Also, the cardamom bun should win awards.”

AS

Ari S.

Neighborhood founder

Visit Us

Find your favorite seat.

Stop by for a quick espresso, stay for an afternoon, or reserve a cozy table for your next catch-up.

Address

1842 Willow Street

Downtown Arts District

Hours

Monday — Friday 7 AM — 7 PM
Saturday 8 AM — 8 PM
Sunday 8 AM — 5 PM

Good to Know

Before you stop by.

Yes. We offer oat, almond, and coconut milk, and our baristas can recommend which option pairs best with your drink.

Absolutely. We have fast Wi‑Fi, accessible outlets, and weekday quiet hours from 7 AM to 11 AM for focused work.

We do. The café is available for small gatherings, tastings, creative workshops, and community events outside peak hours.

Yes. Our pastry team bakes in small batches daily, with seasonal flavors rotating throughout the week.

Your cup is waiting

Make today a little warmer.

Come in for your usual, try something seasonal, or bring a friend and make the café yours for the afternoon.
